summary: Bug fix verification testing for ForJenta AI code generation IDE. Testing focused on: homepage, workspace, desktop builder, mobile builder, navigation, and backend API. All core features verified working. Backend 12/12 tests pass. Frontend UI loads correctly on both desktop (1920px) and mobile (390px) viewports.
test_credentials: No authentication used - tested public pages and mock project
seed_data_creation: Using existing demo project proj-demo-1 (todo-app) from localStorage
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from the review request verified working: 1) Homepage loads with prompt input and quick prompts, 2) Workspace page loads correctly with project list, 3) Desktop builder (/project/proj-demo-1) shows files sidebar, code editor, AI Builder panel with prompt input, 4) Mobile builder shows MobileBuilderView with data-testid, conversation feed, quick actions, and bottom composer dock, 5) Navigation between pages works correctly, 6) Backend /api/status returns 200. The 401 errors in console are expected for unauthenticated API calls to /api/auth/me and /api/projects. Mock project data comes from localStorage (todo-app with 4 files). GenerationPanel receives promptHistory prop. MobileConversationFeed preserves messages including prompt history.
